title: Marketplace Manager - Blue Dart - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Blue Dart - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Blue Dart invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Marketplace Manager at our Ghaziabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Blue Dart:
Blue Dart is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Blue Dart!
